title: centaurea stoebe
intro: Centaurea stoebe, also known as knapweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia but has been naturalized in other parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea stoebe include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve digestion and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
